entry.title: Dirilis Ertugrul Season 5 Episode 43 in HD With Urdu Subtitles

link.title: Dirilis Ertugrul Season 5 Episode 43 in HD With Urdu Subtitles

entry.content:
Dirilis Ertugrul Season 5 Episode 43 in HD With Urdu Subtitles
The hit TV show from TRT, Ertugrul Ghazi, is now available in Urdu brought to you by TRT and PTV.
‘Ertugrul Ghazi’ is an epic story rooted in the historical events of Anatolia (modern-day Turkey). It is the tale of a daring character with enthralling love and a sense of justice that was strong enough to change the fate of the World. The nomadic Kayi tribe of the Oghuz Turks are on a quest to find a place they can finally call home. Ertugrul leads his people through perseverance against hardship while striving for justice and maintaining the traditions of the land. By battling his enemies with strength and bravery, Ertugrul consequently plants the seed that would lead to the founding of the Ottoman Empire, which spread across three continents and ruled for six centuries.
Watch NEW episode every Friday, Saturday and Sunday.
Tune in to PTV’s flagship entertainment channel PTV Home at 7.55 pm every Friday, Saturday and Sunday to be the first to watch.
Dirilis: Ertugrul (transl.?"Resurrection: Ertugrul") is a Turkish historical fiction[2] and adventure television series created by Mehmet Bozdag, starring Engin Altan Düzyatan in the title role. It was filmed in Riva, a village in the Beykoz district of Istanbul, Turkey, and premiered on TRT 1 in Turkey on December 10, 2014. The show is set in 13th century and centers around the life of Ertugrul, the father of Osman I, who was the founder of the Ottoman Empire.
Season 5
The fifth season takes place 10 years after the Battle of Kose Dag, where the Mongols took over the Seljuk state. The arrival of the new tax collectors, the Umurogullari, disrupts the balance of Sogut. Umur Bey’s daughter, Ilbilge Hatun, infiltrates the Kayi tribe to gain information on Ertugrul, and falls in love with him. Meanwhile, Commander Dragos, a disgraced Byzantine warrior seeks to conquer Sogut. He kills Umur Bey and frames Gunduz Alp, pitting two tribes against each other.
Emir Bahattin’s presence serves to disrupt Ertugrul’s plans against the Mongols. Following Gunduz’s acquittal after the truth about Dragos is revealed, Beybolat Bey arrives. As the son of Umur Bey and Bey of the Umuroglu after his father’s death he is a Seljuk assassin that works with the Mongols to wipe out rebelling Oguz Tribes, under a fake name Albasti. Ertugrul’s brothers are on the run from Albasti and hide in the mountains. Beybolat seeks to marry Ilbilge with Bahattin, but his plans are ruined when Ertugrul asks her for marriage, and she accepts.
Ertugrul raids the Mongols and steals the tax gold in order to start a huge war. This leads to Emir Bahattin’s death with Albasti and Dragos still at large. Ertugrul survives an assassination attempt when Zangoc (the real Dragos) saves him from the assassin’s arrows. Ertugrul now suspects Zangoc of being Dragos and tasks Mergen to track him. Hulagu Han sends Commander Alincak and Subutay to raid the Kayi tribe.
entry.summary: Dirilis Ertugrul Season 5 Episode 43 in HD With Urdu Subtitles The hit TV show from TRT, Ertugrul Ghazi, is now available in Urdu brought to you by TRT and PTV. ‘Ertugrul Ghazi’ is an epic story rooted in the historical events of Anatolia (modern-day Turkey). It is the tale of a daring character with enthralling love and a sense of justice that was strong enough to change the fate of the World. The nomadic Kayi tribe of the Oghuz Turks are on a quest to find a place they can finally call home. Ertugrul leads his people through perseverance against hardship while striving for justice and maintaining the traditions of the land. By battling his enemies with strength and bravery, Ertugrul consequently plants the seed that would lead to the founding of the Ottoman Empire, which spread across three continents and ruled for six centuries. Watch NEW episode every Friday, Saturday and Sunday. Tune in to PTV’s flagship entertainment channel PTV Home at 7.55 pm every Friday, Saturday and Sunday to be the first to watch. Dirilis: Ertugrul (transl.?"Resurrection: Ertugrul") is a Turkish historical fiction[2] and adventure television series created by Mehmet Bozdag, starring Engin Altan Düzyatan in the title role. It was filmed in Riva, a village in the Beykoz district of Istanbul, Turkey, and premiered on TRT 1 in Turkey on December 10, 2014. The show is set in 13th century and centers around the life of Ertugrul, the father of Osman I, who was the founder of the Ottoman Empire. Season 5 The fifth season takes place 10 years after the Battle of Kose Dag, where the Mongols took over the Seljuk state. The arrival of the new tax collectors, the Umurogullari, disrupts the balance of Sogut. Umur Bey’s daughter, Ilbilge Hatun, infiltrates the Kayi tribe to gain information on Ertugrul, and falls in love with him. Meanwhile, Commander Dragos, a disgraced Byzantine warrior seeks to conquer Sogut. He kills Umur Bey and frames Gunduz Alp, pitting two tribes against each other. Emir Bahattin’s presence serves to disrupt Ertugrul’s plans against the Mongols. Following Gunduz’s acquittal after the truth about Dragos is revealed, Beybolat Bey arrives. As the son of Umur Bey and Bey of the Umuroglu after his father’s death he is a Seljuk assassin that works with the Mongols to wipe out rebelling Oguz Tribes, under a fake name Albasti. Ertugrul’s brothers are on the run from Albasti and hide in the mountains. Beybolat seeks to marry Ilbilge with Bahattin, but his plans are ruined when Ertugrul asks her for marriage, and she accepts. Ertugrul raids the Mongols and steals the tax gold in order to start a huge war. This leads to Emir Bahattin’s death with Albasti and Dragos still at large. Ertugrul survives an assassination attempt when Zangoc (the real Dragos) saves him from the assassin’s arrows. Ertugrul now suspects Zangoc of being Dragos and tasks Mergen to track him. Hulagu Han sends Commander Alincak and Subutay to raid the Kayi tribe.

entry.title: Jiofiberன் 30 days free trial offer ! அட்டகாசமான அறிவிப்பு OneIndia Tamil

link.title: Jiofiberன் 30 days free trial offer ! அட்டகாசமான அறிவிப்பு OneIndia Tamil

entry.content:
ரிலையன்ஸ் ஜியோ என்றாலே என்ன ஆஃபர், என்ன சலுகை என்று கேட்கும் அளவுக்கு, அடுத்தடுத்த சலுகைகளை வாரி வழங்கி வருகின்றது அந்த நிறுவனம்.
jiofiber launches 30 days free trial for all new users
entry.summary: ரிலையன்ஸ் ஜியோ என்றாலே என்ன ஆஃபர், என்ன சலுகை என்று கேட்கும் அளவுக்கு, அடுத்தடுத்த சலுகைகளை வாரி வழங்கி வருகின்றது அந்த நிறுவனம். jiofiber launches 30 days free trial for all new users

entry.title: Air Selangor: Water supply restored in 811 areas

link.title: Air Selangor: Water supply restored in 811 areas

entry.content:
Water supply has been restored to 811 locations, or 62.7% of the 1,292 areas affected by the unscheduled water disruption in seven regions in the Klang Valley as of 6.30 pm Sunday (Sept 6).
Air Selangor Sdn Bhd (Air Selangor) Corporate Communications head, Elina Baseri in a statement, said the remaining 481 areas were still in the process of being restored.
Meanwhile, Air Selangor denied a message that has gone viral on social media sites that rationing exercise will be carried out and that the water is not safe for consumption.
Read more at
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: Water supply has been restored to 811 locations, or 62.7% of the 1,292 areas affected by the unscheduled water disruption in seven regions in the Klang Valley as of 6.30 pm Sunday (Sept 6). Air Selangor Sdn Bhd (Air Selangor) Corporate Communications head, Elina Baseri in a statement, said the remaining 481 areas were still in the process of being restored. Meanwhile, Air Selangor denied a message that has gone viral on social media sites that rationing exercise will be carried out and that the water is not safe for consumption. Read more at WATCH MORE: SUBSCRIBE: LIKE:

entry.title: Alain-Fabien Delon hospitalisé : sa mère Rosalie lui crie son amour

link.title: Alain-Fabien Delon hospitalisé : sa mère Rosalie lui crie son amour

entry.content: Le jeune comédien va mieux : le 3 septembre 2020, Alain-Fabien Delon s’est saisi de son compte Instagram pour donner de ses nouvelles à ses fans. Depuis son lit d’hôpital, le fils d’Alain Delon et Rosalie van Breemen s’est montré positif. La veille, il a été pris en charge par une ambulance et conduit à l’hôpital Cochin, à Paris, pour un pneumothorax (une affection de la plèvre, lorsque de l’air ou du gaz remplit la cavité pleurale, entre les poumons et la cage thoracique).   "Je suis encore vivant, ne vous en faites pas, a-t-il annoncé à ses abonnés Instagram le temps d’une story en blouse d’hôpital. On m’a posé un drain hier soir, du coup ça va un peu mieux. Ils vont voir s’ils ne peuvent le retirer tout à l’heure ou demain (…). Merci pour vos messages." Même s’il est mal en point, le comédien de 26 ans n’a pas oublié pour autant d’assurer la promotion de Grand Hôtel, la nouvelle saga de TF1, dont le premier épisode a été diffusé jeudi soir : "Vous m’en dites des nouvelles, s’il …
entry.summary: Le jeune comédien va mieux : le 3 septembre 2020, Alain-Fabien Delon s’est saisi de son compte Instagram pour donner de ses nouvelles à ses fans. Depuis son lit d’hôpital, le fils d’Alain Delon et Rosalie van Breemen s’est montré positif. La veille, il a été pris en charge par une ambulance et conduit à l’hôpital Cochin, à Paris, pour un pneumothorax (une affection de la plèvre, lorsque de l’air ou du gaz remplit la cavité pleurale, entre les poumons et la cage thoracique). "Je suis encore vivant, ne vous en faites pas, a-t-il annoncé à ses abonnés Instagram le temps d’une story en blouse d’hôpital. On m’a posé un drain hier soir, du coup ça va un peu mieux. Ils vont voir s’ils ne peuvent le retirer tout à l’heure ou demain (…). Merci pour vos messages." Même s’il est mal en point, le comédien de 26 ans n’a pas oublié pour autant d’assurer la promotion de Grand Hôtel, la nouvelle saga de TF1, dont le premier épisode a été diffusé jeudi soir : "Vous m’en dites des nouvelles, s’il …

entry.title: Mermer parçasını altın sarısı folyo ile sararak 3 kişiyi dolandırdılar

link.title: Mermer parçasını altın sarısı folyo ile sararak 3 kişiyi dolandırdılar

entry.content: Mersin’de mermer parçalarını sarı jelatinle sarıp, altın diye sattıkları iddiasıyla biri kadın 3 kişi gözaltına alındı. Kendilerini öğretmen olarak tanıtıp, adres sorma bahanesiyle yolda tanıştıkları kişilere altın görünümlü mermerleri satan şahısların, vatandaşları 27 bin 300 lira dolandırdığı belirlendi.
entry.summary: Mersin’de mermer parçalarını sarı jelatinle sarıp, altın diye sattıkları iddiasıyla biri kadın 3 kişi gözaltına alındı. Kendilerini öğretmen olarak tanıtıp, adres sorma bahanesiyle yolda tanıştıkları kişilere altın görünümlü mermerleri satan şahısların, vatandaşları 27 bin 300 lira dolandırdığı belirlendi.

entry.title: ‘Robin’s Wish’ Celebrates Robin William’s Life While Explaining His Death

link.title: ‘Robin’s Wish’ Celebrates Robin William’s Life While Explaining His Death

entry.content:
Susan Schneider Williams is working to reclaim her husband’s legacy with the new documentary "Robin’s Wish".
The project is designed to celebrate Robin Williams’s life while explaining the undiagnosed illness that resulted in his death.
Williams died by suicide in 2014 at the age of 63.
The cause of his death was traced to Lewy body dementia, a rare, degenerative neurological disorder.
According to CNN, the documentary is a deeply personal look back at Williams’ final days, through the eyes of family and friends.
"Robin’s Wish" is available on-demand beginning Sept. 1.
entry.summary: Susan Schneider Williams is working to reclaim her husband’s legacy with the new documentary "Robin’s Wish". The project is designed to celebrate Robin Williams’s life while explaining the undiagnosed illness that resulted in his death. Williams died by suicide in 2014 at the age of 63. The cause of his death was traced to Lewy body dementia, a rare, degenerative neurological disorder. According to CNN, the documentary is a deeply personal look back at Williams’ final days, through the eyes of family and friends. "Robin’s Wish" is available on-demand beginning Sept. 1.

entry.title: No Time To Die Trailer #2 (2020) Daniel Craig, Rami Malek Action Movie HD

link.title: No Time To Die Trailer #2 (2020) Daniel Craig, Rami Malek Action Movie HD

entry.content: In No Time To Die, Bond has left active service and is enjoying a tranquil life in Jamaica. His peace is short-lived when his old friend Felix Leiter from the CIA turns up asking for help. The mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous than expected, leading Bond onto the trail of a mysterious villain armed with dangerous new technology.
entry.summary: In No Time To Die, Bond has left active service and is enjoying a tranquil life in Jamaica. His peace is short-lived when his old friend Felix Leiter from the CIA turns up asking for help. The mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous than expected, leading Bond onto the trail of a mysterious villain armed with dangerous new technology.

entry.title: Le plan de relance a-t-il pour contrepartie la réforme des retraites ?

link.title: Le plan de relance a-t-il pour contrepartie la réforme des retraites ?

entry.content: FACT CHECKING - C’est ce qu’a affirmé Marine Le Pen dimanche 6 septembre. Pourtant, si la Commission européenne soutient la réforme, elle ne l’impose pas.
entry.summary: FACT CHECKING - C’est ce qu’a affirmé Marine Le Pen dimanche 6 septembre. Pourtant, si la Commission européenne soutient la réforme, elle ne l’impose pas.

entry.title: Couverture de Valeurs Actuelles: pour Jean-Luc Mélenchon, ‘la droite extrême crée une ambiance malsaine’

link.title: Couverture de Valeurs Actuelles: pour Jean-Luc Mélenchon, ‘la droite extrême crée une ambiance malsaine’

entry.content: Suite à la publication d’une couverture de "Valeurs Actuelles" représentants la députée LFI Danièle Obono en esclave, les soutiens sont nombreux. Pour Jean-Luc Mélenchon, "la droite extrême crée une ambiance malsaine".
entry.summary: Suite à la publication d’une couverture de "Valeurs Actuelles" représentants la députée LFI Danièle Obono en esclave, les soutiens sont nombreux. Pour Jean-Luc Mélenchon, "la droite extrême crée une ambiance malsaine".

entry.title: Lone Moratorium: Supreme Court ने दी राहत, दो महीने तक कोई लोन NPA नहीं होगा वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Lone Moratorium: Supreme Court ने दी राहत, दो महीने तक कोई लोन NPA नहीं होगा वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Loan Moratorium: Supreme Court granted relief, there will be no loan NPA for two months. Between the Corona period and the lockdown, the Supreme Court has given a big relief in the loan moratorium case. The court has ordered that the accounts which are not NPA till 31 August will not be declared NPA for the next two months.
कोरोना काल और लॉकडाउन के बीच सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने लोन मोरेटोरियम मामले में बड़ी राहत दी है. कोर्ट ने आदेश दिया है कि जो खाते 31 अगस्त तक एनपीए नहीं हैं, उनको अगले दो महीने तक एनपीए घोषित नहीं किया जाएगा.
#LoanMoratorium #SupremeCourt #NPA
entry.summary: Loan Moratorium: Supreme Court granted relief, there will be no loan NPA for two months. Between the Corona period and the lockdown, the Supreme Court has given a big relief in the loan moratorium case. The court has ordered that the accounts which are not NPA till 31 August will not be declared NPA for the next two months. कोरोना काल और लॉकडाउन के बीच सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने लोन मोरेटोरियम मामले में बड़ी राहत दी है. कोर्ट ने आदेश दिया है कि जो खाते 31 अगस्त तक एनपीए नहीं हैं, उनको अगले दो महीने तक एनपीए घोषित नहीं किया जाएगा. #LoanMoratorium #SupremeCourt #NPA

entry.title: Métaux rares : l’Union européenne cherche à réduire sa dépendance

link.title: Métaux rares : l’Union européenne cherche à réduire sa dépendance

entry.content:
L’union européenne veut réussir à garantir son indépendance sur les métaux rares. Ces ressources précieuses sont nécessaires aux nouvelles technologies mais elles sont, pour le moment, très largement importées d’autres pays comme la Chine ou le Chili.
Retrouvez "Europe Matin - 5h-7h" sur :
entry.summary: L’union européenne veut réussir à garantir son indépendance sur les métaux rares. Ces ressources précieuses sont nécessaires aux nouvelles technologies mais elles sont, pour le moment, très largement importées d’autres pays comme la Chine ou le Chili. Retrouvez "Europe Matin - 5h-7h" sur :

entry.title: Olivier Véran alerte sur la hausse des hospitalisations

link.title: Olivier Véran alerte sur la hausse des hospitalisations

entry.content:
Le ministre de la Santé pointe la courbe des hospitalisations et des admissions en réanimation. Avec la fin des vacances et la rentrée, cette hausse devrait se poursuivre.
« Il est évident que dans les 15 prochains jours, il y aura une augmentation du nombre de cas graves d’hospitalisations », a déclaré le ministre de la Santé.
Une évolution déjà constatée sur le terrain. Les spécialistes se veulent rassurants, ils estiment qu’on ne connaîtra pas le même pic épidémique qu’en mars et en avril.
entry.summary: Le ministre de la Santé pointe la courbe des hospitalisations et des admissions en réanimation. Avec la fin des vacances et la rentrée, cette hausse devrait se poursuivre. « Il est évident que dans les 15 prochains jours, il y aura une augmentation du nombre de cas graves d’hospitalisations », a déclaré le ministre de la Santé. Une évolution déjà constatée sur le terrain. Les spécialistes se veulent rassurants, ils estiment qu’on ne connaîtra pas le même pic épidémique qu’en mars et en avril.

entry.title: US Open 2020 - Zverev-Mannarino 2h45 late, Sascha explains what happened and how he experienced it !

link.title: US Open 2020 - Zverev-Mannarino 2h45 late, Sascha explains what happened and how he experienced it !

entry.content: Le match Adrian Mannarino - Alexander Zverev a débuté vendredi soir avec 2h45 de retard dans une totale confusion à Fluhsing Meadows. Le joueur Français a dû attendre l’autorisation du gouverneur de New York pour avoir le droit de pénétrer sur le court. Un rebondissement inattendu dans l’affaire du test positif au coronavirus de Benoît Paire. En conférence de presse après sa victoire contre Adrian Mannarino 6-7(4), 6-4, 6-2, 6-2, Sascha raconte comment il a vécu cette situation et ce match.
entry.summary: Le match Adrian Mannarino - Alexander Zverev a débuté vendredi soir avec 2h45 de retard dans une totale confusion à Fluhsing Meadows. Le joueur Français a dû attendre l’autorisation du gouverneur de New York pour avoir le droit de pénétrer sur le court. Un rebondissement inattendu dans l’affaire du test positif au coronavirus de Benoît Paire. En conférence de presse après sa victoire contre Adrian Mannarino 6-7(4), 6-4, 6-2, 6-2, Sascha raconte comment il a vécu cette situation et ce match.

entry.summary: Le président bélarusse dit avoir déployé des unités à la frontière.View on euronewsBélarus : Alexandre Loukachenko accuse l’Otan de préparer une intervention Bélarus : Alexandre Loukachenko accuse l’Otan de préparer une intervention Bélarus : Alexandre Loukachenko accuse l'Otan de préparer une intervention

entry.title: Covid-19 : 8 550 nouveaux cas recensés en 24 heures en France

link.title: Covid-19 : 8 550 nouveaux cas recensés en 24 heures en France

entry.content: Selon des données publiées par la Direction générale de la santé samedi 5 septembre, 8 550 nouveaux cas de Covid-19 ont été recensés depuis vendredi. Il s’agit d’un chiffre sensiblement du même niveau que la veille (8 975 cas), qui confirme la hausse du nombre de cas constatés ces derniers jours. « En France métropolitaine, la progression de la circulation virale est exponentielle. La dynamique de la transmission en forte croissance est préoccupante », relève Santé publique France dans son point régulier de la situation.
entry.summary: Selon des données publiées par la Direction générale de la santé samedi 5 septembre, 8 550 nouveaux cas de Covid-19 ont été recensés depuis vendredi. Il s’agit d’un chiffre sensiblement du même niveau que la veille (8 975 cas), qui confirme la hausse du nombre de cas constatés ces derniers jours. « En France métropolitaine, la progression de la circulation virale est exponentielle. La dynamique de la transmission en forte croissance est préoccupante », relève Santé publique France dans son point régulier de la situation.

entry.title: Congress Crisis: Rahul Gandhi अध्यक्ष बनेंगे या नहीं?, कांग्रेस नेता चाहते हैं जवाब वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Congress Crisis: Rahul Gandhi अध्यक्ष बनेंगे या नहीं?, कांग्रेस नेता चाहते हैं जवाब वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Congress crisis: Rahul Gandhi will become president or not, leaders writing letters want answers. Tensions persist over the leadership crisis in the Congress. Sonia, who has written a letter about the radical change in the organization, is demanding to clarify the position regarding the post of president.
कांग्रेस में नेतृत्‍व के संकट को लेकर तनाव बरकरार है. संगठन में आमूलचूल बदलाव को लेकर चिट्ठी लिखने वाले सोनिया से अध्‍यक्ष पद को लेकर स्थिति स्‍पष्‍ट करने की मांग कर रहे हैं.
#CongressCrisis #RahulGandhi #SoniaGandhi
entry.summary: Congress crisis: Rahul Gandhi will become president or not, leaders writing letters want answers. Tensions persist over the leadership crisis in the Congress. Sonia, who has written a letter about the radical change in the organization, is demanding to clarify the position regarding the post of president. कांग्रेस में नेतृत्‍व के संकट को लेकर तनाव बरकरार है. संगठन में आमूलचूल बदलाव को लेकर चिट्ठी लिखने वाले सोनिया से अध्‍यक्ष पद को लेकर स्थिति स्‍पष्‍ट करने की मांग कर रहे हैं. #CongressCrisis #RahulGandhi #SoniaGandhi

entry.title: Babil 2. Sezon 2. Teaser

link.title: Babil 2. Sezon 2. Teaser

entry.content:
Para en büyük sınav mı?
İdealist bir ekonomi profesörü olan İrfan’ın hayatı, haksız yere işten atılması ve 7 yaşındaki oğlu Deniz’in hastalanmasıyla alt üst olur. Kapılar birer birer yüzüne kapanırken karısı Eda’nın çocukluk arkadaşları Egemen’den yardım istemesiyle İrfan kendisini hayal bile edemeyeceği karanlık bir maceranın içinde bulur. Evlenmek üzereyken ayrıldığı büyük aşkı İlay’ın tehlikeli iş adamı Süleyman’ın sevgilisi olarak ortaya çıkmasıyla birlikte, İrfan bu macerada aşması gereken birçok sınavla karşı karşıya kalacaktır. Bu macerada karşısına çıkan idealist genç kız Ayşe, onun kurtarıcısı olabilecek mi?
entry.summary: Para en büyük sınav mı? İdealist bir ekonomi profesörü olan İrfan’ın hayatı, haksız yere işten atılması ve 7 yaşındaki oğlu Deniz’in hastalanmasıyla alt üst olur. Kapılar birer birer yüzüne kapanırken karısı Eda’nın çocukluk arkadaşları Egemen’den yardım istemesiyle İrfan kendisini hayal bile edemeyeceği karanlık bir maceranın içinde bulur. Evlenmek üzereyken ayrıldığı büyük aşkı İlay’ın tehlikeli iş adamı Süleyman’ın sevgilisi olarak ortaya çıkmasıyla birlikte, İrfan bu macerada aşması gereken birçok sınavla karşı karşıya kalacaktır. Bu macerada karşısına çıkan idealist genç kız Ayşe, onun kurtarıcısı olabilecek mi?

entry.title: my valentine

link.title: my valentine

entry.content:
I’ve dreamed of this a thousand times before
but in my dreams I couldn’t love you more

my valentine
my valentine
my valentine
entry.summary: I’ve dreamed of this a thousand times before but in my dreams I couldn’t love you more my valentine my valentine my valentine
